section_name: Garage or repair shop to maintain record of repairs made to vehicle involved in crash.

subsections.text: The person in charge of any garage or repair shop to which is brought any motor vehicle which shows evidence of having been involved in a crash and which is repaired in that garage or repair shop shall maintain for 2 years a record of those repairs including the:
Color of the vehicle before the repairs;
Location on the vehicle of the damage repaired;
Total amount of the damage; and
Name and address of the person who requested the repairs.
